excluded_categories.reason: No user input handling, authentication, permission, or data persistence details are specified beyond email and password creation; no security requirements are explicitly stated.
No permission or role-based access control is mentioned in the requirement analysis.
No UI behavior, messages, loading state, or empty state is described in the requirement analysis.
No dependencies are explicitly identified in the requirement analysis.
No network-related requirements or dependencies are mentioned.
No localization or internationalization requirements are specified.

scenario_generation_rules: Generate positive test cases for successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length of 8 characters.
Generate negative test cases for account creation with duplicate email (business rule BR001).
Generate negative test cases for account creation with password shorter than 8 characters (business rule BR002).
Generate validation test cases to verify email uniqueness is checked before account creation (VAL001).
Generate validation test cases to verify password length is at least 8 characters (VAL002).
Generate boundary test cases for password length at exactly 8 characters and just below 8 characters (e.g., 7 characters).

Do not generate test cases for email format validation, password complexity, email verification, maximum password length, error messages, password confirmation, email case sensitivity, or duplicate email behavior, as these are listed as missing information and require clarification.
